top_actions: Fix thread-safety issues in ChromaDB connection pooling - PersistentClient is documented as NOT thread-safe but code uses RLock
Fix async/sync event loop mismanagement in langgraph_adapter.py - sync wrappers creating tasks without awaiting
Remove unnecessary embedding computations from checkpointer implementations - massive performance overhead for key-value storage
Fix race conditions in LRUCache.set() and MemoryPool buffer management
Implement proper resource cleanup and connection lifecycle management across all modules
test_coverage_status: Limited - only 2 memory-specific test files found
